name: Grandma Drumm's Cranberry Orange Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (bread) or 400°F (muffins).
2. Sift together the dry ingredients.
3. Cut in the butter until well combined.
4. Add the wet ingredients and stir until just moistened.
5. Fold in the cranberries.
6. For bread, bake at 350°F for 70 minutes.
7. For muffins, bake at 400°F for 15-20 minutes depending on muffin size.
